ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Bond
Off Calendar Nov-10-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joe Birts (trustee) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Birts reported that the bond was filed this morning and presented an endorsed filed copy to the court. The Court stated that this takes care of what we were waiting for and that the status on filing a bond is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Bond
Off Calendar Oct-27-2015 Continued To Nov-10-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joe Birts in Propria Persona.

Mr. Birts clarified that the Myers Urbatsch firm represents the trust, that he received a letter stating that they could not represent him and that he would need to file a bond and obtain counsel. The Court stated that it needs a bond and that counsel would not be necessary for that. Mr. Birts stated that he has filled out the paperwork for the bond online and will get it filed. The Court stated that Mr. Birts will need to sort out the representation issue and that if the firm is not going to represent him they will need to withdraw. The status on filing bond was continued to November 10, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Oct-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matthew Mraule for (trustee) Henrietta Chavez.

The Court expressed its concern regarding the expenditures in the trust. Mr. Mraule reported that a declaration had been filed, that the carpet was toxic and had to be replaced, that it was a necessary cost which was not covered by public assistance and that a declaration was filed yesterday regarding 7.903 Rule of Court. The Court took the accounting petition under submission stating that it may keep the trust under court supervision for 1 year. Mr. Mraule stated that they do not want to incur additional fees and that the beneficiary is competent enough to monitor the trustee. Mr. Mraule is to submit a proposed order by the end of the day.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
